Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(r'C:\\Users\\Sangkil\\10.업무\\2.Operation\\[Work in Progress] Nissan Pricing_260130.xlsx', data_only=True\)

ws = wb['Master']
print\('=== Master Sheet 120~300 ==='\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=120, max_row=300, values_only=True\):
    if any\(cell is not None for cell in row\):
        cleaned = [c for c in row if c is not None]
        print\(cleaned\)
")
